title: Boat Rental in South Ari Atoll: Costs and Tips for 2026
html:
Planning a boat rental in South Ari Atoll in 2026 means exploring pristine waters near Dhangethi Island from as little as €200 for a half-day trip to over €2,000 for a fully crewed yacht. BoatHire24 connects you with trusted owners so you can compare options and book a charter online directly.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in South Ari Atoll?

Prices range from €200 for a shared tour to €2,500 for a crewed luxury yacht per day. The cost depends on boat type, duration, and season. Expect to pay around €400, €700 for a half-day private motorboat, while a full-day catamaran typically costs €800, €1,200. For a crewed yacht with skipper and crew, budget €1,500, €2,500. Use the boat search on BoatHire24 to find real-time availability and compare prices. You can book a charter online in a few minutes.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in South Ari Atoll?

No licence is required for bareboat rental if you do not meet local requirements, as operators usually provide a skipper. Maldivian law expects a valid international licence for self-drive, but most charters include a professional skipper. The operator confirms exact requirements during booking, so always check the listing details. One option worth a look is the Prestige 500 for hire.

Local tip: book a sunset cruise departing from Dhangethi to spot manta rays near Mandhoo reef; the calm monsoon months from December to April offer the best visibility.

Where to set off in South Ari Atoll

Most charters depart from Dhangethi island harbour, which shelters a small marina for day boats. Other popular departure points include Mahibadhoo jetty in the southern part of the atoll, the anchorage at Hangnaameedhoo, and the sandbank near Maamigili. Each offers direct access to the house reef and channels leading to the open sea. You can also see more at check availability.

Which boat to rent

  1. Small open motorboat, best for snorkelling trips to nearby reefs, 4, 6 guests, from €200 for half a day.
  2. Catamaran sailing yacht, ideal for a relaxed day cruise with family, 8, 10 guests, from €800 for a full day.
  3. Luxury motor yacht (e.g. Prestige 500), perfect for a private charter with comfort and style, 6, 8 guests, from €1,500 per day. Check the Prestige 500 for hire on BoatHire24 for detailed specs.
  4. Crewed speedboat, great for island hopping or whale shark excursions, 6, 8 guests, from €600 for half a day.

When choosing, consider the distance you want to cover. For example, from Dhangethi to the famous whale shark spot near Maamigili is about 10 nautical miles, so a faster boat saves time. To see how booking works, visit the boat search.

Cost breakdown for boat rental in South Ari Atoll

  • Shared group snorkelling tour: from €80 per person, typically 2 hours.
  • Private small motorboat half-day: €300, €500 for 3 hours, includes fuel.
  • Catamaran full-day charter: €900, €1,200 for 6 hours, up to 10 guests.
  • Crewed luxury yacht including crew and lunch: €1,800, €2,500 for 6 hours, 6, 8 guests.

All prices are in EUR and may vary by season. High season runs from December to April when the northeast monsoon brings calm seas; lower rates apply in May, November, though occasional squalls occur.

At a glance

  • Price band: €200, €2,500 per day
  • Peak months: December to April
  • Trip length: 2 hours to full day
  • Capacity: 4, 10 guests
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in South Ari Atoll

Can I rent a boat without a skipper in the Maldives?

Technically yes if you hold an international licence, but most renters prefer a skipper because local navigation is challenging and insurance often requires one.

What is the best month for whale shark sightings?

September to November offers the highest chance of meeting whale sharks near Maamigili and Dhangethi, though they are present year-round.

How far is Dhangethi from Male international airport?

Dhangethi is about 90 kilometres southwest of Male, reachable by speedboat transfer in around 90 minutes.

To plan your trip, browse listings on BoatHire24 and check availability for your dates. For owners, listing your vessel on the platform is straightforward: simply visit the homepage and click list your boat to reach travellers from around the world.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in South Ari Atoll and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
